Mushie.name: 蘑菇人 Mushie
Mushie.description:
蘑菇人是友好的真菌人，由包括其他真菌物种在内的多种孢子混合培育而成。由于这些方法，蘑菇人在外貌和能力方面都展现出相当的多样性。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.968RuHNyzZ4VWGI9.JournalEntryPage.YvNnAjaJJi3g6QP9]{蘑菇人族裔}

Mushies are friendly fungus people cultivated from a mixture of spores, including those from other fungal species. Thanks to these methods, mushies display considerable diversity in both their physical appearance and their abilities.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.968RuHNyzZ4VWGI9.JournalEntryPage.YvNnAjaJJi3g6QP9]{Mushie Ancestry}

Will-o'-Wisp.name: 鬼火 Will-o'-Wisp
Will-o'-Wisp.description:
鬼火是由空气与光构成的短暂生物。尽管它们最为人所知的是那些关于闹鬼的发光微粒将沼泽旅人引向溺水厄运的传说，但它们真正的动机如同夜空中的繁星一般繁多而多样。

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.968RuHNyzZ4VWGI9.JournalEntryPage.bHQwFtjVzrPUx5Y8]{鬼火族裔}

Will-o'-wisps are ephemeral beings of air and light. Though they are best known from tales of haunted glowing motes leading marshland travelers to a watery doom, their true motivations are as numerous and varied as the stars in the sky.

@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-ancestries-year-of-mysteries-pf2e.journals.JournalEntry.968RuHNyzZ4VWGI9.JournalEntryPage.bHQwFtjVzrPUx5Y8]{Will-O’-Wisp Ancestry}
